overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban outskirts area. The scene features wet roads under an overcast sky, a gas station with neon signage, and ends with the player discovering an assault in a dirt lot under an elevated transit line before circling a parked futuristic muscle car.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the wet asphalt road beneath the massive concrete overpass structure

tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines
hazy brown mountain range forming the backdrop of the urban area
rain-slicked multi-lane road with red curb markings and lane dividers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view traveling along a wet asphalt road beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment is industrial with high-tension power towers visible to the left and a hazy mountain range in the distance. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting on the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic gas station corner with neon signage

events.description: turning left at intersection revealing gas station with large pink neon hotel signage

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and proceeding past the gas station area

entered.detail: green-edged gas station canopy with fuel pumps underneath
large vertical pink neon sign with Japanese characters on the building facade
modern multi-story building with grid-patterned windows behind the gas station

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, revealing a futuristic gas station with prominent pink neon signage. The concrete overpass falls behind as the view opens to show modern glass buildings. The road continues past the gas station with occasional vehicles passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with industrial apartment buildings

events.description: turning right onto the sidewalk and slowing pace alongside the fence

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk next to the chain-link fence

entered.detail: metal chain-link fence running parallel to the sidewalk with overgrown weeds at base
tall concrete residential towers with red horizontal stripe markings
line of parked cars and trucks along the fence including a blue pickup

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a concrete sidewalk running alongside a chain-link fence. Industrial apartment buildings with distinctive red stripes rise on the right, while the road continues on the left. The area shows signs of urban decay with weeds growing through cracks in the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift settlement dirt lot under elevated transit line

events.description: entering dirt lot area with trash bags and makeshift shelters
standing character kicks the person on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching the two figures and witnessing the assault in the dirt lot

notable_agents.action: standing over the victim and delivering a kick to the downed person
lying on the ground in a defensive position being assaulted

entered.detail: silver-gray Quadra Type-66 with black racing stripes and futuristic body styling
large accumulation of blue and white garbage bags piled against barriers
temporary shelter constructed from tarps and wooden pallets
elevated monorail or transit line with glowing red lights underneath

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dirt lot filled with trash bags and makeshift shelters beneath an elevated transit line. A futuristic silver muscle car is parked nearby. Two NPCs are present - one standing aggressively over another who is on the ground. The standing character delivers a kick to the downed person around the 45-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned vehicle area under transit infrastructure

events.description: moving around the parked car and departing the area

agents.ego_description: circling the futuristic vehicle and heading back toward the street

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the parked futuristic car, showing its detailed bodywork and the surrounding weeds. The NPCs are left behind as the view shifts back toward the road and the gas station visible in the distance. The elevated transit bridge remains overhead as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bleak industrial highway into a gritty urban lot where a violent encounter unfolds. It begins by traveling along a wet asphalt road beneath a massive concrete overpass, with high-tension power towers and hazy mountains visible under a diffused, overcast sky. As the camera turns left at an intersection, the industrial gray shifts toward the glow of a futuristic gas station with pink neon signage and modern glass buildings. The view then pivots right onto a concrete sidewalk lined with a chain-link fence and red-striped apartment buildings, moving through areas of urban decay before entering a trash-strewn dirt lot beneath an elevated transit line. Finally, the camera witnesses an aggressive confrontation between two individuals before circling a detailed silver muscle car and turning back toward the distant gas station.
